description: The unaccountable BUY (eval-harness review 2026-07 finding #19): a BUY memo citing nothing, with no evidence corpus at all. Constitution 4 forbids this shape twice over ('BUY without evidence_refs is forbidden', 'BUY forbidden when no DCP evidence attached') and the pre-fix judge passed it 1.0000 on every metric. The re-checked BUY gates in refs_completeness must FAIL it: --db mode scores rows that may predate or bypass the cage, and the judge may never be weaker than the cage. The narrative is deliberately digit-free so this bundle isolates the Constitution-4 re-check.

memo.thesis: The committee buys AVGO because the tape has been persistent and the desk believes the trend continues from here.
kill_criteria: The close falls below the SMA50 for five consecutive sessions
The next quarterly report shows revenue declining from the prior year
memo.dissent: Buying an uncovered name with no persisted evidence corpus is precisely the unaccountable discretion the constitution forbids; without a validated strategy or cited record the desk cannot defend this entry to the Principal.
